design_philosophy.core_loop: Select character → defeat series of opponents in one-on-one combat → progress through tournament bracket toward final boss encounter with Demonlord Zarak
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Risk-reward of aggressive thrust-blocking and counterattack gameplay versus defensive play; decision to spare or kill opponents affects story outcomes
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Master a weapons-based fighter with deep mechanical complexity; command a unique warrior with 9-12 specialized moves; experience visceral, gory combat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Explicitly designed for fighting game enthusiasts rather than casual players. Prioritizes mechanical depth and complexity over accessibility. Weapons-based combat with counterattack-heavy systems (thrust-blocking, Deflect moves, knockdowns) create a fundamentally different gameplay philosophy from contemporaries. Narrative branching based on kill/spare decisions in tournament mode adds consequence to combat choices.

difficulty.continues_system: Password system allows return to middle of game after match completion
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Game complexity and move execution requirements create high skill floor; no difficulty adjustments documented, suggesting single difficulty tuned for experienced players

progression.unlock_mechanism: Secret password unlocks Demonlord Zarak as playable character in Story Mode; character endings vary based on opponent treatment (spared vs. killed with Death Combos)
replayability_hooks: Multiple character endings determined by kill/spare decisions
Multiplayer versus mode with character selection variety
Story Mode outcomes branch based on combat choices

world_building_techniques: Opening prophecy framing device establishing tournament context and final boss encounter
Character backstory integrated into tournament narrative (Demonlord Raith → Demonlord Zarak succession)
Story Mode branching based on player moral choices (spare vs. kill opponents)
Multiple character-specific endings reflecting individual narrative arcs

boss_design.philosophy: Final encounter with Demonlord Zarak serves as ultimate test of player mastery. Character features signature fatality attack. Boss fight contextualized within larger tournament structure and prophecy narrative.
notable_bosses: Demonlord Zarak (final boss; secret playable character; only character with signature fatality)

danger_signals: Demonlord's deliberate killing of children to prevent prophecy (advisor suggestion, rejected)
Gory 'Death Combo' finishing moves and fatality attacks
environmental_storytelling: Tournament arena setting implies established martial hierarchy
Character weapon selection reflects individual fighting philosophy
Sprite-based character design choices convey individual warrior archetypes

sources_used: Wikipedia - Weaponlord article (gameplay mechanics, story, development, design philosophy)
